compiled_state.title: E1: cut cli.py entrypoint over to the argparse CLI (cutover, no deletions)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
E1: cut the rebar CLI entrypoint over to the in-process argparse CLI built in E0. Replace the body of
`rebar.cli:main` so it delegates to `rebar._cli.main(sys.argv[1:])` (and `sys.exit`s its return code)
instead of subprocessing the bash dispatcher. The dispatcher still EXISTS — category-B arms inside
`rebar._cli` transitionally subprocess it — so this is purely an entrypoint swap, no bash deleted.

This is the CUTOVER commit: after it, the live `rebar` CLI is the argparse path; the bash dispatcher
is reachable only via the category-B transitional passthrough, not as the primary entrypoint. Because
E0 proved the help/overview/error surface byte-identical and category-A arms call the same in-process
functions the dispatcher did, the user-visible surface is unchanged.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `rebar.cli:main` delegates to `rebar._cli.main` (entrypoint cutover); no bash deleted in E1
- [ ] `reconcile` still routed correctly (now via `rebar._cli`)
- [ ] Help/overview/error byte-parity holds through the live `rebar` binary (re-verify against goldens)
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green; live-dogfood soak (full-surface probe + fsck clean) passes
- [ ] `pipx install --editable . --force` live `rebar`/`rebar-mcp` exercise the argparse path on this repo's store

comments.body: E1 cutover live-verify: this comment was written through the new argparse in-process leaf-write path.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: E1 DONE (commit c64c8892). cli.py:main now delegates to rebar._cli.main (3-line facade); bash dispatcher reachable only via category-B transitional passthrough. Live-verified through the real rebar binary on this repo's store: help/overview byte-parity, category-A reads+writes in-process, category-B passthrough (fsck), unknown-subcommand exit 1, fsck clean. Gates: full non-integration suite 1652 passed; isolated full-surface probe 141/141. The live rebar CLI is now the argparse path.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
